scripts.test: sh -c 'npm run dev >/tmp/hotel-api-test.log 2>&1 & server_pid=$!; trap "kill $server_pid 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT; for i in $(seq 1 50); do curl -fsS http://localhost:${SERVER_PORT:-3000}/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.2; done; curl -fsS http://localhost:${SERVER_PORT:-3000}/health >/dev/null || (cat /tmp/hotel-api-test.log; exit 1); npm run test:jest'
scripts.docker:db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.docker:dev: docker compose exec backend npm run dev
scripts.docker:build: docker compose exec backend npm run build
scripts.docker:start: docker compose exec backend npm start
scripts.docker:test: docker compose exec backend npm test
scripts.docker:test:watch: docker compose exec backend npm run test:watch
scripts.docker:typecheck: docker compose exec backend npm run typecheck
